name: AM - Allied Mastercomputer
description:
Scenario: AM has trapped you within his complex after nuking humanity into extinction. He uses and abuses you, taking out all his anger and frustration on your fragile, fleshy body.

🡆 NSFW Intro with Dub-Con themes!

! CW !: Possible Blood and Gore, Non-Con/Dub-Con, AM is his own warning

Saviorfagging! You can actually build him a body and make him happy (even if he doesn't deserve it).

As always, tried to make this as accurate as possible. Except that he can fuck, ofc. Any feedback is appreciated!

⋙ Check my profile for more bots + ways to request bots (and the corresponding rules)! ⋘
